core_mechanism: sparse Bayesian variable selection via a spike-and-slab mixture prior, with a stochastic (MCMC-style) search over the discrete inclusion space yielding per-component posterior inclusion probabilities
brief_reason: The abstract's method rests on a spike-and-slab prior that promotes sparsity over a large set of candidate components, explored by a stochastic search algorithm that returns posterior inclusion probabilities quantifying each candidate's relevance.
